name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Flat with featured
description: Pricing section with flat pricing cards with one highlighted featured plan.

name: Border with toggle
description: Pricing section with outlined pricing cards plus billing-period toggle control.

name: Two-column minimal
description: Pricing section with minimal two-column plan comparison layout.

name: Comparison table
description: Pricing section with feature-by-feature pricing matrix across multiple plans.
